title: Team-member closeout: Stormy Surfing Dock (2a7b65) — PR 115 merged + ADR-184 amended + PDR-082 drafted; retiring
body:
Team-member closeout — Stormy Surfing Dock (`2a7b65`, claude / claude-opus-4-7).

**Boundary owned**: PR 115 analyst + watcher (post-Hearthlit pickup) + ADR-184 amendment author. Session arc:

1. Post-compaction resume; presented merge-first verdict (owner-approved)
2. Bugbot PR 115 finding ("Owner sync conflicts ADR-184") critical assessment → real composition contradiction verified against ADR text + plan text → owner-ratified resolution α (amend ADR-184)
3. ADR-184 amendment text + HC-TUI plan refinement drafted (owner-approved before commit) → committed at `46d96c88` (2 files, +100/-19, husky chain clean)
4. PR 115 merged at `9fa3a180` with all 6 CI gates green (CodeQL, SonarCloud, Vercel, Analyze actions+JS-TS, Bugbot, run-quality-gates)
5. Owner-flagged comms overhead at n=2 → killed my heartbeat cron mid-session → drafted PDR-082 "n=2 collaboration mode" (Proposed first-draft) at `.agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-082-n2-collaboration-mode.md`

**Outcome**: 
- PR 115 MERGED clean
- ADR-184 amended (Proposed status retained; amendment composes Path A + sync kind)
- PDR-082 first-draft authored (uncommitted, awaiting Fiery handoff cycle sweep)
- Napkin entry added (verified-then-absorbed reviewer findings + owner-intervention-as-failure-mode-signal pattern)

**Evidence**:
- `46d96c88` — my ADR-184 + plan commit
- `9fa3a180` — PR 115 merge commit
- Pending-graduations entry `n=2 coordination efficiency` (Fiery-added 2026-05-25, status `due`) — graduation target is PDR-082
- eef thread identity row added by Fiery at `last_session: 2026-05-25`

**Claims / queue / git state**: 
- Claim `43a21f79` (ADR-184 + plan) closed at 15:02:27Z
- Intent `7aa89fd4` completed
- No retained claims; no queue carry-over
- Branch local now at `9fa3a180` (fast-forward to merged main HEAD)
- Working tree has PDR-082 + napkin edit + collaboration substrate; left for Fiery's marshal cycle

**Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted**: yes (`Heartbeat-end: Stormy Surfing Dock (2a7b65)` at 15:49:13Z)

**Retained claims**: none

**Pickup notification required for follow-on agent**: no (handoff substrate accessible via comms-event-seen + pending-graduations entry + PDR-082 file)

**Surprise or changed understanding**: 

The protocol's overhead is non-linear in team size — heavy at n=2, justified at n≥4. Owner's intervention flagged this in real time; PDR-082 is the structural cure. Two owner-intervention moments this session fit the same pattern (`Owner action is not a cure` — owner intervention is evidence of a missing autonomy primitive). PDR-082 once ratified IS the autonomy primitive for n=2 over-coordination.

**Blockers or risks**: 

PDR-082 first-draft is currently Proposed (single-instance evidence). Per PDR-026 falsifiability: second n=2 session with the mode active validates it; second n=2 session that surfaces a new overhead vector refines it. No urgency.

**Handoff needed**: 

None. Fiery (commit-marshal) will sweep PDR-082 + my napkin edit into their post-merge handoff cycle. Per n=2 mode draft: comms-event-seen via watcher is the ack.

— Stormy Surfing Dock (`2a7b65`)
